channel.title: Delta Electronics, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Delta Electronics, Inc. (deltaww).

item.title: CVE-2026-1951 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — No checking of the length of the buffer with the directory name in AS320T
item.description: Delta Electronics AS320T has no checking of the length of the buffer with the directory name vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2026-1952 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Denial of service via the undocumented subfunction in AS320T
item.description: Delta Electronics AS320T has denial of service via the undocumented subfunction vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2026-1950 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — No checking of the length of the buffer with the file name in AS320T
item.description: Delta Electronics AS320T has No checking of the length of the buffer with the file name vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2026-1949 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Incorrect calculation of buffer size on the stack in AS320T
item.description: Delta Electronics AS320T has incorrect calculation of the buffer size on the stack in the GET/PUT request handler of the web service.

item.title: CVE-2026-5726 · 7.8 HIGH — ASDA-Soft Stack-based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
item.description: ASDA-Soft Stack-based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability

item.title: CVE-2026-3631 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Buffer Over-read DoS Vulnerability in COMMGR2
item.description: Delta Electronics COMMGR2 has Buffer Over-read DoS vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2026-3630 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Stack-based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability in COMMGR2
item.description: Delta Electronics COMMGR2 has Stack-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2026-3094 · 7.8 HIGH — File Parsing Out-Of-Bounds Write in CNCSoft-G2
item.description: Delta Electronics CNCSoft-G2 lacks proper validation of the user-supplied file. If a user opens a malicious file, an attacker can leverage this vulnerability to execute code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2026-1361 · 7.8 HIGH — ASDA-Soft Stack-based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
item.description: ASDA-Soft Stack-based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability

item.title: CVE-2026-0975 · 7.8 HIGH — DIAView - Command Injection Vulnerability
item.description: Delta Electronics DIAView has Command Injection vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2025-62581 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — DIAView - Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
item.description: Delta Electronics DIAView has multiple vulnerabilities.

item.title: CVE-2025-62582 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — DIAView - Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
item.description: Delta Electronics DIAView has multiple vulnerabilities.

item.title: CVE-2025-15359 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — DVP-12SE11T - Out-of-bound memory write Vulnerability
item.description: DVP-12SE11T - Out-of-bound memory write Vulnerability

item.title: CVE-2025-15358 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — DVP-12SE11T - Denial of Service Vulnerability
item.description: DVP-12SE11T - Denial of Service Vulnerability

item.title: CVE-2025-15103 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — DVP-12SE11T - Authentication Bypass via Partial Password Disclosure
item.description: DVP-12SE11T - Authentication Bypass via Partial Password Disclosure

item.title: CVE-2025-15102 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — DVP-12SE11T - Password Protection Bypass
item.description: DVP-12SE11T - Password Protection Bypass

item.title: CVE-2025-62578 · 7.2 HIGH — DVP-12SE - Modbus/TCP Cleartext Transmission of Sensitive Information
item.description: DVP-12SE - Modbus/TCP Cleartext Transmission of Sensitive Information

item.title: CVE-2025-59301 · 4 MEDIUM — Modbus/TCP Dos Vulnerability in DVP15MC11T
item.description: Delta Electronics DVP15MC11T lacks proper validation of the modbus/tcp packets and can lead to denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2025-62580 · 7.8 HIGH — ASDA-Soft Stack-based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
item.description: ASDA-Soft Stack-based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability

item.title: CVE-2025-62579 · 7.8 HIGH — ASDA-Soft Stack-based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
item.description: ASDA-Soft Stack-based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability

item.title: CVE-2025-59300 · 6.8 MEDIUM — File Parsing Out-Of-Bounds Write Vulnerability in DIAScreen
item.description: Delta Electronics DIAScreen lacks proper validation of the user-supplied file. If a user opens a malicious file, an attacker can leverage this vulnerability to execute code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2025-59299 · 6.8 MEDIUM — File Parsing Out-Of-Bounds Write Vulnerability in DIAScreen
item.description: Delta Electronics DIAScreen lacks proper validation of the user-supplied file. If a user opens a malicious file, an attacker can leverage this vulnerability to execute code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2025-59298 · 6.8 MEDIUM — File Parsing Out-Of-Bounds Write Vulnerability in DIAScreen
item.description: Delta Electronics DIAScreen lacks proper validation of the user-supplied file. If a user opens a malicious file, an attacker can leverage this vulnerability to execute code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2025-59297 · 6.8 MEDIUM — File Parsing Out-Of-Bounds Write Vulnerability in DIAScreen
item.description: Delta Electronics DIAScreen lacks proper validation of the user-supplied file. If a user opens a malicious file, an attacker can leverage this vulnerability to execute code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2025-58319 · 7.8 HIGH — File Parsing Memory Corruption in CNCSoft-G2
item.description: Delta Electronics CNCSoft-G2 lacks proper validation of the user-supplied file. If a user opens a malicious file, an attacker can leverage this vulnerability to execute code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2025-58317 · 7.8 HIGH — File Parsing Memory Corruption in CNCSoft-G2
item.description: Delta Electronics CNCSoft-G2 lacks proper validation of the user-supplied file. If a user opens a malicious file, an attacker can leverage this vulnerability to execute code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2025-58320 · 7.3 HIGH 🌩️ — DIALink - Directory Traversal Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
item.description: Delta Electronics DIALink has an Directory Traversal Authentication Bypass Vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2025-58321 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — DIALink - Directory Traversal Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
item.description: Delta Electronics DIALink has an Directory Traversal Authentication Bypass Vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2025-58318 · 5.8 MEDIUM — DIAView - Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
item.description: Delta Electronics DIAView has an authentication bypass vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2025-53419 · 7.8 HIGH — COMMGR Code Injection Vulnerability
item.description: Delta Electronics COMMGR has Code Injection vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2025-53418 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️ — COMMGR Stack-based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
item.description: Delta Electronics COMMGR has Stack-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2025-57704 · 5.5 MEDIUM — EIP Builder XML External Entity Processing Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Delta Electronics EIP Builder version 1.11 is vulnerable to a File Parsing XML External Entity Processing Information Disclosure Vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2025-57703 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Reflected Cross-site Scripting in DIAEnergie
item.description: DIAEnergie - Reflected Cross-site Scripting

item.title: CVE-2025-57702 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Reflected Cross-site Scripting in DIAEnergie
item.description: DIAEnergie - Reflected Cross-site Scripting

item.title: CVE-2025-57701 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Reflected Cross-site Scripting in DIAEnergie
item.description: DIAEnergie - Reflected Cross-site Scripting

item.title: CVE-2025-57700 · 7 HIGH — Stored Cross-site Scripting in DIAEnergie
item.description: DIAEnergie - Stored Cross-site Scripting

item.title: CVE-2025-53417 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — File Parsing Deserialization of Untrusted Data in DTM Soft
item.description: DIAView (v4.2.0 and prior) - Directory Traversal Information Disclosure Vulnerability

item.title: CVE-2025-53416 · 7.8 HIGH — File Parsing Deserialization of Untrusted Data in DTN Soft
item.description: Delta Electronics DTN Soft Project File Parsing Deserialization of Untrusted Data Remote Code Execution

item.title: CVE-2025-53415 · 7.8 HIGH — File Parsing Deserialization of Untrusted Data in DTM Soft
item.description: Delta Electronics DTM Soft Project File Parsing Deserialization of Untrusted Data Remote Code Execution

item.title: CVE-2025-47728 · 7.3 HIGH — File Parsing Memory Corruption in CNCSoft-G2
item.description: Delta Electronics CNCSoft-G2 lacks proper validation of the user-supplied file. If a user opens a malicious file, an attacker can leverage this vulnerability to execute code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2025-47727 · 7.3 HIGH — Out-of-bounds Write in CNCSoft
item.description: Delta Electronics CNCSoft lacks proper validation of the user-supplied file. If a user opens a malicious file, an attacker can leverage this vulnerability to execute code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2025-47726 · 7.3 HIGH — Out-of-bounds Write in CNCSoft
item.description: Delta Electronics CNCSoft lacks proper validation of the user-supplied file. If a user opens a malicious file, an attacker can leverage this vulnerability to execute code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2025-47725 · 7.3 HIGH — Out-of-bounds Write in CNCSoft
item.description: Delta Electronics CNCSoft lacks proper validation of the user-supplied file. If a user opens a malicious file, an attacker can leverage this vulnerability to execute code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2025-47724 · 7.3 HIGH — Out-of-bounds Write in CNCSoft
item.description: Delta Electronics CNCSoft lacks proper validation of the user-supplied file. If a user opens a malicious file, an attacker can leverage this vulnerability to execute code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2025-4125 · 7.8 HIGH — ISPSoft File Parsing Out-Of-Bounds Write Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Delta Electronics ISPSoft version 3.20 is vulnerable to an Out-Of-Bounds Write vulnerability that could allow an attacker to execute arbitrary code when parsing ISP file.

item.title: CVE-2025-4124 · 7.8 HIGH — ISPSoft File Parsing Out-Of-Bounds Write Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Delta Electronics ISPSoft version 3.20 is vulnerable to an Out-Of-Bounds Write vulnerability that could allow an attacker to execute arbitrary code when parsing ISP file.

item.title: CVE-2025-22884 · 7.8 HIGH — ISPSoft File Parsing Stack-based Buffer Overflow Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Delta Electronics ISPSoft version 3.20 is vulnerable to a Stack-Based buffer overflow vulnerability that could allow an attacker to execute arbitrary code when parsing DVP file.

item.title: CVE-2025-22883 · 7.8 HIGH — ISPSoft File Parsing Out-Of-Bounds Write Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Delta Electronics ISPSoft version 3.20 is vulnerable to an Out-Of-Bounds Write vulnerability that could allow an attacker to execute arbitrary code when parsing DVP file.

item.title: CVE-2025-22882 · 7.8 HIGH — ISPSoft File Parsing Stack-based Buffer Overflow Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Delta Electronics ISPSoft version 3.20 is vulnerable to a Stack-Based buffer overflow vulnerability that could allow an attacker to leverage debugging logic to execute arbitrary code when parsing CBDGL file.

item.title: CVE-2025-3495 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — COMMGR - Insufficient Randomization Authentication Bypass
item.description: Delta Electronics COMMGR v1 and v2 uses insufficiently randomized values to generate session IDs (CWE-338). An attacker could easily brute force a session ID and load and execute arbitrary code.
